repos.description: Detecting fraudulent credit card transactions using machine learning models and real-world transactional data.

repos.name: EW-Forge
repos.description: EW-Forge is a women-led sustainability platform designed to streamline e-waste collection and functional component redistribution. The platform connects households and organizations with responsible recycling services while promoting green entrepreneurship and circular economy practices.
